title: liparis koreana
intro: Liparis koreana, also known as the Korean orchid or Manjing, is a species of orchid native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Liparis koreana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exerting antioxidant effects. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used as a herbal tea, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
